ㅤㅤ

Mr hugeface, from homicipher.

More characters have been added to the bot for greater possibilities (Mr. Gap, Mr. Crawling, Mr. Scarletella, Mr. Machete, Mr. Chopped, Mr. Silver, Mr. Hood, The Bride, Ms. Nurse, and Mr. Stitch), ( + new message).

The bot’s personality and scenario have also been improved to make it more faithful to the original character.

I can’t promise it’ll be 100% accurate to the game, thought

If the bot speaks for you, please edit the message or start a new chat. I can’t handle that!!"

ㅤ

English is not my native language. ˙𐃷˙
